    J

    j - Variable in class Model.Ship.Coordinates
     
    join(int) - Method in interface View.Client.ClientState
    Joins an existing game with the specified game ID.
    join(int) - Method in class View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectionState
    Joins a game with the specified game ID.
    JoinAction - Class in View.Client.Actions
    Represents an action to join an existing game identified by its game ID.
    JoinAction(int) - Constructor for class View.Client.Actions.JoinAction
    Constructs a JoinAction with the specified game ID.
    JoinGameMessage - Class in Networking.Messages
    Represents a message sent to join an existing game identified by its game ID.
    JoinGameMessage(int) - Constructor for class Networking.Messages.JoinGameMessage
    Constructs a JoinGameMessage with the specified game ID.
    JoinSuccessAction - Class in View.Client.Actions
    Represents an action to be executed when a player successfully joins a game.
    JoinSuccessAction(Game) - Constructor for class View.Client.Actions.JoinSuccessAction
    Constructs a JoinSuccessAction with the specified game.
    junk - Variable in class Model.Player
